text:
- Compute data lineage for CDEs – establishing baseline maturity
- Measure data quality across in-scope functional areas
- Review technical data reconciliation for Payments Screening
- Promote capability building within BAU teams  
78+  
Systems reviewed  
6  
Functional areas  
in scope  
150+  
SMEs consulted  
Data Governance – Solution  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
Data Lineage  
- 6 dataflow diagrams & 108 interface contracts
- 205 CDEs visualised end-to-end
- Comprehensive mapping of areas, CDEs, interfaces & SMEs
- Augmented existing information in Planview  
Data Quality Rules  
- Technical rules derived from lineage metadata
- 400+ DQ rules & SSDs for 205 CDEs
- SAS tooling configured for automated checks
- 2 DQ dimensions: Conformity & Completeness  
Reconciliation Controls  
- CDE-level: record count, field value & format matching
- Interface-level: job control, error thresholds, alerting
- Auto-halt on mismatch with detailed logging
- Payments Screening maturity assessment (20 SMEs)  
Capability Transfer  
- Active coaching of BAU colleagues
- Sustainable capability building
- Successful handover for ongoing operations
- Knowledge embedded in organisational tooling  
Data Governance – Key Metrics & Benefits  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study  
205  
CDEs traced  
end-to-end  
400+  
DQ rules  
operationalised  
78  
Systems mapped with  
full lineage  
Key Benefits  
- End-to-end data lineage providing full transparency for regulatory compliance
- Proactive data quality monitoring reducing compliance risk
- Maturity assessment enabling targeted improvements in Payments Screening
- Comprehensive mapping augmenting organisational knowledge
- Capability transfer ensuring sustainable governance beyond the engagement  
Summary  
This programme demonstrates the value of a strategic, partnership-driven approach to AI and Data transformation:  
- AI CoE: Responsible experimentation delivering ~90% efficiency gains, with a pipeline of 10+ use cases across Customer, Colleague & IT Operations
- Modern Data Platform: Legacy decommissioning with >30% development acceleration through GenAI-based techniques and assets using GitHub CoPilot
- Data Governance: 205 CDEs traced, 400+ DQ rules, and comprehensive reconciliation controls across 78 systems  
Confidential  
AI & Data Transformation – Case Study
name: Chunk 2/2

raw_entities.name: Data Governance Solution
raw_entities.description: A comprehensive data governance programme delivered as part of an AI and Data Transformation engagement. It encompasses data lineage mapping, data quality rule implementation, reconciliation controls, and capability transfer to ensure sustainable governance beyond the initial engagement.
context: Data Governance – Solution
Data Governance: 205 CDEs traced, 400+ DQ rules, and comprehensive reconciliation controls across 78 systems
ensuring sustainable governance beyond the engagement

raw_entities.name: AI CoE
raw_entities.description: A strategic AI Centre of Excellence initiative focused on responsible experimentation and delivering measurable efficiency gains. It serves as a pipeline generator for multiple use cases across customer, colleague, and IT operations.
context: AI CoE: Responsible experimentation delivering ~90% efficiency gains
with a pipeline of 10+ use cases across Customer, Colleague & IT Operations

raw_entities.name: Modern Data Platform
raw_entities.description: A next-generation data infrastructure platform designed to decommission legacy systems and accelerate development. It leverages GenAI-based techniques and assets to drive significant speed improvements in data engineering and delivery.
context: Modern Data Platform: Legacy decommissioning with >30% development acceleration
through GenAI-based techniques and assets using GitHub CoPilot

raw_entities.name: Data Lineage Framework
raw_entities.description: A structured framework for mapping end-to-end data flows, visualising critical data elements, and documenting interface contracts. It provides full transparency and serves as the foundation for downstream data quality and reconciliation activities.
context: Data Lineage
205 CDEs visualised end-to-end
Comprehensive mapping of areas, CDEs, interfaces & SMEs

raw_entities.name: Data Quality Rules Engine
raw_entities.description: A technical rule engine that derives data quality standards from lineage metadata. It operationalises automated checks across conformity and completeness dimensions to proactively monitor and enforce data standards.
context: Data Quality Rules
400+ DQ rules & SSDs for 205 CDEs
SAS tooling configured for automated checks

raw_entities.name: Reconciliation Controls
raw_entities.description: A set of automated controls that validate data at both the critical data element and interface levels. It includes record counting, field matching, error threshold monitoring, and auto-halt mechanisms with detailed logging to ensure data integrity.
context: Reconciliation Controls
CDE-level: record count, field value & format matching
Interface-level: job control, error thresholds, alerting

raw_entities.name: Capability Transfer Programme
raw_entities.description: A structured knowledge transfer and coaching engagement designed to embed sustainable capabilities within business-as-usual teams. It ensures operational handover and long-term governance ownership by the client.
context: Capability Transfer
Active coaching of BAU colleagues
Sustainable capability building
Successful handover for ongoing operations

raw_entities.name: Data Lineage Computation
raw_entities.description: The technical ability to compute and map data lineage for critical data elements, establishing a baseline maturity and creating visual dataflow diagrams and interface contracts.
context: Compute data lineage for CDEs – establishing baseline maturity
6 dataflow diagrams & 108 interface contracts

raw_entities.name: Data Quality Measurement
raw_entities.description: The capability to systematically measure and monitor data quality across functional areas using derived technical rules and automated checks focused on conformity and completeness.
context: Measure data quality across in-scope functional areas
Technical rules derived from lineage metadata
2 DQ dimensions: Conformity & Completeness

raw_entities.name: Technical Data Reconciliation
raw_entities.description: The ability to perform technical reconciliation across systems and interfaces, validating record counts, field values, and formats while managing error thresholds and alerting.
context: Review technical data reconciliation for Payments Screening
Auto-halt on mismatch with detailed logging
Payments Screening maturity assessment (20 SMEs)
